title: Chabelo and Pepito vs. The Monsters
original_title: Chabelo Y Pepito Contra Los Monstruos
overview: An ordinary day's hike gets rough when two youngsters escape from the main group into the woods and, after finding a grotto, discover that there is more to it than just darkness.
